title: The Others Keep Arlong Busy
description: On pages 9–12, the others keep arlong busy focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.
scene: On pages 9–12, the others keep arlong busy focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Arlong!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sister Nami...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NAC- chan!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nami...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami... (I)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Great timing. I was just about to kill these pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So what brings you here?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I came here...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to kill you...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To kill me!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: In the 8 years you've been with me...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How many times have you tried to kill me...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whether by assassination, poisoning, or surprise attacks...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But did you ever succeed!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shouldn't you know well by now that it's impossible for inferior humans to kill me...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Listen well... I'm not going to kill you... and I won't let you escape either...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll have you be my carto- Grapher forever!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...but as you know, I'm an understanding guy!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't want to chain down a young woman if possible.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's why I'd rather have you be my cartographer out of your own will.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Other than you,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm planning to kill everyone here right now but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you agree to join the ARLONG Pirates again,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and continue drawing maps for me as one of my crew officers,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: I'll specially allow for the lives of those cocoyashi Villagers to be spared...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can't say the same for these guys, however...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They've pissed me off too much.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So which will you choose to side with...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Will you choose to side with me and save your fellow villagers?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Or will you side with these weaklings and attempt to fight me...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...but of course, seeing as how your most dependable fighters have been reduced to this sad state,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Your inevitable tragedy is only too easy to see...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So tell me, Nami...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are you with me?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Or with them...?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
